title: See Leonardo DiCaprio Hug It Out With Timothée Chalamet After Losing Best Actor at Golden Globes 2026
text: Leonardo DiCaprio's Gracious Moment at Golden Globes 2026. At the 2026 Golden Globes, Leonardo DiCaprio showed great sportsmanship after losing the Best Actor (Comedy/Musical) category to Timothée Chalamet. Despite the loss, Leonardo DiCaprio had no hard feelings towards Timothée Chalamet, sharing a sweet moment with the 30-year-old during the 2026 Golden Globes ceremony. Leo shared a congratulatory hug with Timothée. During their exchange, DiCaprio told Chalamet: I love you, man. The article also notes that DiCaprio praised Chalamet during their exchange, though the specific compliments came from Timothée, who mentioned studying Leo and admiring his work in The Wolf of Wall Street. DiCaprio was nominated in the same category for One Battle After Another but was gracious in defeat.
